purpose: Risk-adjusted asymmetry engine. Only qualified_asymmetry and undervalued_exception display as opportunities; weak candidates are research tasks, not ticker ideas.

opportunity_clusters.macro_theme_summary: Index Ballast / Liquidity Beta is currently mixed inside the market-orientation model; this defines macro direction before ticker selection.
opportunity_clusters.second_order_direction: AI infrastructure pressure moves into power, grid, construction, and equipment bottlenecks.

candidate_tickers.name: Nextracker
candidate_tickers.assigned_agent_task: Attach primary evidence, price-zone, invalidation, and risk-budget support for NXT.
candidate_tickers.why_this_ticker: More experimental energy-infrastructure idea: not just AI power demand, but grid-edge hardware and utility-scale solar deployment efficiency.
candidate_tickers.what_is_underpriced: meaningful pullback; possible research entry setup only after evidence and support confirmation
invalidation_questions: Risk to invalidate/check: Policy and tariff risk

candidate_tickers.name: Rocket Lab
candidate_tickers.assigned_agent_task: Attach primary evidence, price-zone, invalidation, and risk-budget support for RKLB.
candidate_tickers.why_this_ticker: A creative industrial-space candidate: asymmetric if launch cadence, defense/customer demand, and satellite systems compound into infrastructure status.
candidate_tickers.what_is_underpriced: sharp downside dislocation; require cause check before any add-zone work
invalidation_questions: Risk to invalidate/check: High beta market sensitivity

candidate_tickers.name: Palantir
candidate_tickers.assigned_agent_task: Attach primary evidence, price-zone, invalidation, and risk-budget support for PLTR.
candidate_tickers.why_this_ticker: A controversial but interesting candidate: if AI shifts from model infrastructure to operational deployment, PLTR may be a pure workflow/ontology beneficiary.
candidate_tickers.what_is_underpriced: meaningful pullback; possible research entry setup only after evidence and support confirmation
invalidation_questions: Risk to invalidate/check: Government/commercial concentration debates

candidate_tickers.name: Oklo
candidate_tickers.assigned_agent_task: Attach primary evidence, price-zone, invalidation, and risk-budget support for OKLO.
candidate_tickers.why_this_ticker: Highly experimental asymmetric optionality on advanced nuclear power. This belongs in the creative lab, not the core portfolio, unless evidence improves dramatically.
candidate_tickers.what_is_underpriced: sharp downside dislocation; require cause check before any add-zone work

candidate_tickers.name: Vertiv
candidate_tickers.assigned_agent_task: Attach primary evidence, price-zone, invalidation, and risk-budget support for VRT.
candidate_tickers.why_this_ticker: Infrastructure-side exposure to AI/data-center buildout: power, cooling, and uptime constraints rather than model/platform winners.
candidate_tickers.what_is_underpriced: meaningful pullback; possible research entry setup only after evidence and support confirmation
invalidation_questions: Risk to invalidate/check: Execution and margin pressure
Risk to invalidate/check: Industrial cyclicality if capex slows

candidate_tickers.name: iShares Bitcoin Trust
candidate_tickers.assigned_agent_task: Attach primary evidence, price-zone, invalidation, and risk-budget support for IBIT.
candidate_tickers.why_this_ticker: A cleaner vehicle to compare against levered/path-dependent crypto exposure; may reduce decay risk while preserving directional Bitcoin beta.
candidate_tickers.what_is_underpriced: meaningful pullback; possible research entry setup only after evidence and support confirmation
invalidation_questions: Risk to invalidate/check: Bitcoin drawdown risk
Risk to invalidate/check: No cash flow valuation anchor

candidate_tickers.name: Alphabet
candidate_tickers.assigned_agent_task: Attach primary evidence, price-zone, invalidation, and risk-budget support for GOOGL.
candidate_tickers.why_this_ticker: Potential quality compounder if search/cloud/AI investment remains durable and valuation offers a cleaner margin of safety than hotter AI infrastructure names.
candidate_tickers.what_is_underpriced: neutral price context; compare against thesis and valuation evidence
invalidation_questions: Risk to invalidate/check: Search disruption narrative
Risk to invalidate/check: AI capex margin drag

candidate_tickers.name: Quanta Services
candidate_tickers.assigned_agent_task: Attach primary evidence, price-zone, invalidation, and risk-budget support for PWR.
candidate_tickers.why_this_ticker: A picks-and-shovels candidate for the physical grid buildout needed by electrification, data centers, and energy transition.
candidate_tickers.what_is_underpriced: neutral price context; compare against thesis and valuation evidence
invalidation_questions: Risk to invalidate/check: Utility capex timing

candidate_tickers.name: GE Vernova
candidate_tickers.assigned_agent_task: Attach primary evidence, price-zone, invalidation, and risk-budget support for GEV.
candidate_tickers.why_this_ticker: A creative infrastructure candidate for the electricity scarcity layer: grid hardware, gas turbines, and electrification may be a more durable AI-adjacent bottleneck than another software/platform add.
candidate_tickers.what_is_underpriced: neutral price context; compare against thesis and valuation evidence
invalidation_questions: Risk to invalidate/check: Crowding after power-theme enthusiasm

candidate_tickers.name: TransMedics
candidate_tickers.assigned_agent_task: Attach primary evidence, price-zone, invalidation, and risk-budget support for TMDX.
candidate_tickers.why_this_ticker: A genuinely different growth infrastructure idea: organ transplant logistics and preservation network effects, far from current AI/platform concentration.
candidate_tickers.what_is_underpriced: neutral price context; compare against thesis and valuation evidence
invalidation_questions: Risk to invalidate/check: Small/mid-cap valuation risk

candidate_tickers.name: Eaton
candidate_tickers.assigned_agent_task: Attach primary evidence, price-zone, invalidation, and risk-budget support for ETN.
candidate_tickers.why_this_ticker: A less flashy but potentially higher-quality way to express the grid/data-center power constraint without owning only the hottest AI names.
candidate_tickers.what_is_underpriced: neutral price context; compare against thesis and valuation evidence

candidate_tickers.name: Cameco
candidate_tickers.assigned_agent_task: Attach primary evidence, price-zone, invalidation, and risk-budget support for CCJ.
candidate_tickers.why_this_ticker: A creative non-AI software expression of the power scarcity thesis: nuclear fuel exposure if electricity demand and energy security remain structurally important.
candidate_tickers.what_is_underpriced: meaningful pullback; possible research entry setup only after evidence and support confirmation

opportunity_clusters.macro_theme_summary: Streaming / Attention Stack is currently mixed inside the market-orientation model; this defines macro direction before ticker selection.
opportunity_clusters.second_order_direction: AI infrastructure pressure moves into power, grid, construction, and equipment bottlenecks.

candidate_tickers.name: Broadcom
candidate_tickers.assigned_agent_task: Attach primary evidence, price-zone, invalidation, and risk-budget support for AVGO.
candidate_tickers.why_this_ticker: Picks-and-shovels exposure to AI networking and custom ASIC demand with a more diversified enterprise/software profile than pure GPU exposure.
candidate_tickers.what_is_underpriced: sharp downside dislocation; require cause check before any add-zone work

candidate_tickers.name: NVIDIA
candidate_tickers.assigned_agent_task: Attach primary evidence, price-zone, invalidation, and risk-budget support for NVDA.
candidate_tickers.why_this_ticker: Direct exposure to AI accelerator demand; useful benchmark for whether the portfolio should own the center of the AI capex stack instead of only cloud/platform beneficiaries.
candidate_tickers.what_is_underpriced: neutral price context; compare against thesis and valuation evidence
invalidation_questions: Risk to invalidate/check: Crowding and multiple compression
Risk to invalidate/check: Export controls / supply chain limits
Risk to invalidate/check: AI capex digestion cycle

candidate_tickers.name: Reddit
candidate_tickers.assigned_agent_task: Attach primary evidence, price-zone, invalidation, and risk-budget support for RDDT.
candidate_tickers.why_this_ticker: Experimental attention/data asset: interesting if human conversation data becomes a scarce AI-training/licensing input and ad monetization keeps improving.
candidate_tickers.what_is_underpriced: neutral price context; compare against thesis and valuation evidence
invalidation_questions: Risk to invalidate/check: Platform governance/user backlash
